name: mark-hintz-showreel
description: Remotion portfolio showreel for Mark Hintz

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/Root.tsx Showreel out/showreel.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:720: npx remotion render src/Root.tsx Showreel out/showreel-720.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:1080: npx remotion render src/Root.tsx Showreel1080 out/showreel-1080.mp4 --codec h264
